# Example daemon trace fragment containing a FAKE-but-realistic AWS access key pair.
# The values are random-shaped (not the AWS docs canonical fakes, which trufflehog
# deliberately ignores); trufflehog detects them and the redactor strips them.
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIA4PMTM5KZBKSPK6XV
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=Jw7e9KqFnDxR8YzN2v3Lb6gMpHaTqKsVwXfRcLmS
region=us-east-1
